description: Security review for web apps: OWASP-aligned checks for injection, XSS, CSRF, authorization vs authentication, mass assignment, file uploads, secrets handling, and dependency audit — mapped to PHP/Laravel and JS/Vue specifics. Includes /security:review and a security-engineer worker agent.

reasons: out-of-band: install via install-agents.sh (Codex plugins cannot bundle subagents); model omitted (inherits session model)
